title: CapeJS
description: Mod utilizing KubeJS to add custom capes to players using scripts
body:
# CapeJS

CapeJS is a Forge/Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.19.2 and 1.20.1 that allows you to add custom capes to users using KubeJS. It's intended purpose is for modpack developers to give capes to pack developers, pack completionists, friends, etc. Adding capes is done through a client script, [which is detailed here](https://github.com/TheStaticVoid/CapeJS/wiki/Adding-capes). The cape texture is also used to replace the elytra texture!
 
## Requirements
- KubeJS (and its dependencies)

 

If you experience any issues, please reach out on [Discord](https://discord.gg/RDaJEnN3uS).


[![Ko-fi](https://storage.ko-fi.com/cdn/kofi2.png?v=3)](https://ko-fi.com/F2F2MLSD4)
